title: identity insert
text: identity insert Control the actual value inserted into a Sybase identity field. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = identity insert Description When this option is set, users can control the actual value inserted into a Sybase identity field. When this option is not set, the Uniface application has no control over the value of Identity fields because the Sybase DBMS controls its value. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
